about:
## About Stream Archive

Live streams are temporary — once they end, they're gone. Stream Archive is a cloud-based service that automatically records live broadcasts from your favourite creators, so you never miss a moment. Watch on your schedule, download for later, or create clips from any stream.

### How It Works

Just add the creators you want to follow. Stream Archive monitors them 24/7 and starts recording the moment they go live. When the stream ends, the full recording is ready to watch or download — no manual intervention needed.

### Watch Anywhere, Anytime

Every stream is stored securely in the cloud. Use the built-in player to watch instantly, or download the full video to your device. Your personal stream library is always available, on any device.

### One Place for All Your Platforms

TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Bigo, Tango, Kick, AfreecaTV, Pandalive — it doesn't matter where your favourite creators stream. Stream Archive brings them all together in a single library.

### No Software Required

Forget screen recorders and browser extensions that need your computer running. Stream Archive works entirely in the cloud — recording happens automatically, even while you sleep.

### Free to Start

Create a free account and start saving streams from up to 3 creators. Need more? Upgrade to Premium for unlimited creators, downloads, AI clips, and more.
